{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Shi family gardens
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Shi family gardens]] are surrounded by blue mountain roses and tiny clusters of cloudbell.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
